description: Test full troubleshooting flow for wifi connectivity

scenario.task: You are a customer whose wifi keeps dropping. Call the agent and follow their troubleshooting steps.

scenarioExpectations.expectation: The agent should use a troubleshooting tool

_comment: BUG: taskCompletionBehavior is TASK_COMPLETION_BEHAVIOR_UNSPECIFIED instead of TASK_SATISFIED. This causes the platform to use a lenient completion check that marks tasks as completed even when the agent didn't finish the full flow.
